heading: Today
text: Periods of sunshine.  More clouds through NY, with a chance of localized, passing showers.  Highs in the low to mid 60s.  Winds south 10 to 15 mph, a few gusts to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Becoming cloudy.  Showers increasing through NY, spreading east into VT and the Berkshires, after midnight east.  Lows in the 40s.  Winds southeast 10 to 15 mph, a few gusts to 25 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Cloudy, with occasional rain and showers, diminishing west and south in the afternoon.  Cool and raw.  Highs in the upper 40s to low 50s.  Winds from the east to southeast near 10 mph, shifting to the northwest late.
